features: NATURAL FOOT TREATMENT: Escenti Cool Feet Foot Soak contains natural magnesium sulphate crystals with added Green Tea & Chamomile fragrance.

SOOTHING & RELAXING: Escenti Cool Feet Soothing Foot Soak contains pure minerals which have stood the test of time. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins. Escenti Cool Feet Soothing Foot Soak will help to ease tired and troublesome aching pains in feet and muscles and reduce foot odour

EASY TO USE: Add half a cup of Escenti Foot Soak Crystals to a foot spa or bowl of warm water, mix well and allow feet to soak for 15 - 20 minutes. Alternatively; add to warm running bath water for a wonderfully soothing & relaxing bath, soak for at least 20 minutes to give the Escenti Foot Soak a chance to soften the skin and to be absorbed. Re-seal bag after each use

ESCENTI FOOT SOAK, 100 PercentNATURAL: Natural Magnesium Sulphate contained in Escenti Foot Soak is known for its theraputic properties. The salts are filled with natural healing elements that occur naturally in the body but often lost in a busy day. Magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins. Perfect for those with an extremely active lifestyle. Helping you soothe aches and pains .
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: READY TO USE, RE-SEALABLE 450g POUCH
description: Product Description ESCENTI COOL FEET SOOTHING GREEN TEA & CHAMOMILE ESSENTIAL FOOT SOAK Directions Add half a cup of Escenti Foot Soak Crystals to a foot spa or bowl of warm water, mix well and allow feet to soak for 15 - 20 minutes. Alternatively; add to warm running bath water for a wonderfully soothing & relaxing bath, soak for at least 20 minutes. Safety Warning May cause skin irritation. Use in a well-lit area to avoid slips and falls. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not use if you have any skin conditions or are pregnant. Always follow the directions for use.
